units.lean_file_body:
namespace AlgebraicCombinatorics

theorem fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff_field {K : Type*} [Field K] (a : PowerSeries K) :
    IsUnit a ↔ constantCoeff a ≠ 0 := by
  rw [fps_invertible_iff_constantCoeff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨u, hu⟩
    rw [← hu]
    exact Units.ne_zero u
  · intro h
    exact ⟨Units.mk0 (constantCoeff a) h, rfl⟩

end AlgebraicCombinatorics
notes: Uses the prior project theorem reducing invertibility of a power series to invertibility of its constant coefficient. Over a field, an invertible scalar is nonzero by destructing the IsUnit witness, and a nonzero scalar gives a unit via Units.mk0.
